metadata.title: Indo Tropical Agriculture | Indonesian Agriculture Exporter to EU Markets
metadata.description: Leading Indonesian agriculture exporter supplying premium cloves, ginger, nutmeg, vanilla, black pepper, turmeric, cashew nuts, and more to European and global markets. Direct from farmers, worldwide shipping.

visionMission.mission: To realize our vision, we are committed to supporting Indonesian farmers to improve their well-being and quality of life through education and training.

about.title: Your Trusted Partner for Indonesian Agriculture
about.intro1: Indo Tropical Agriculture connects buyers worldwide with the finest agricultural products from Indonesia. Our deep roots in Indonesian farming communities combined with international trade expertise make us your ideal partner.
about.intro2: We believe in sustainable practices, fair trade, and building long-term relationships with both our farmers and customers.
about.quote: Every product we export carries our commitment to quality and our dedication to the farmers who make it possible.

value1.title: Direct from Farmers
value1.description: We work directly with Indonesian farmers, ensuring fair trade and eliminating middlemen for better pricing.

value2.title: Quality Focus
value2.description: Rigorous quality control at every stage ensures our products meet the highest standards.

value3.title: Reliable Logistics
value3.description: Our established shipping network ensures timely delivery worldwide with full tracking.

value4.title: Competitive Pricing
value4.description: Direct sourcing and efficient operations allow us to offer competitive prices without compromising quality.

cloves.name: Cloves
cloves.description: Cloves come from the flower buds of an evergreen tree that is native to the North Moluccas Islands in Indonesia. Strong of aroma and hot and pungent in taste, cloves are used to flavour many foods, particularly meats and bakery products.
cloves.fullDescription: Premium Indonesian cloves exported directly from spice islands. High-quality whole cloves and powder suitable for food, pharmaceutical, and essential oil industries. Our cloves are carefully selected, dried, and processed to preserve their intense aroma and pungent flavor.

ginger.name: Fresh Ginger
ginger.description: Ginger, (Zingiber officinale), herbaceous perennial plant of the family Zingiberaceae, probably native to southeastern Asia, or its aromatic, pungent rhizome (underground stem) used as a spice, flavouring, food, and medicine. Ginger has anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidative properties which can control the aging process.
ginger.fullDescription: Premium Grade A fresh ginger from East Java, Indonesia. Our ginger offers high oil content and characteristic pungent flavor, ideal for culinary, pharmaceutical, and beverage industries. Sourced from farms with minimum 8 months age for optimal potency and aroma.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services
faq.metaTitle: FAQ | Indo Tropical Agriculture - Indonesian Exporter
faq.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about Indo Tropical Agriculture's products, shipping, payment terms, and export services. Get answers about ordering Indonesian agricultural products.

moq.question: What is your minimum order quantity?
moq.answer: Our minimum order quantity varies by product type and destination. Generally, we require a minimum of 1 metric ton for bulk orders and 20ft container (approximately 15-18 tons) for full container loads. For smaller orders, please contact us to discuss options and pricing.

samples.question: Do you offer samples?
samples.answer: Yes, we offer samples for quality verification. Sample sizes typically range from 500g to 1kg depending on the product. Samples are available for purchase at cost plus shipping. Sample costs can be deducted from your first bulk order. Please contact our sales team to request samples.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept multiple payment methods including T/T (Telegraphic Transfer), L/C (Letter of Credit) at sight, and negotiable payment terms for established clients. For international orders, we recommend T/T with 30% deposit and 70% before shipment, or irrevocable L/C at sight. All payments must be made in USD or EUR.

shipping.question: Do you ship to Europe?
shipping.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide to major ports in Europe, Asia, the Middle East, and the Americas. We have extensive experience exporting to countries including Germany, Netherlands, UK, France, USA, UAE, Japan, and China. We work with reputable shipping lines and can arrange both FOB and CIF terms.

shippingTime.question: What is your shipping time to Europe?
shippingTime.answer: Shipping time varies by destination. To European ports (Rotterdam, Hamburg, Antwerp), transit time is typically 25-35 days depending on the specific route. To Asia and the Middle East, transit ranges from 7-20 days. To the Americas (East Coast), expect 30-40 days. We provide tracking information for all shipments.

documentation.question: Do you handle export documentation?
documentation.answer: Yes, we handle all export documentation required for international shipments. This includes commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, phytosanitary certificate, and any additional certificates required by destination countries. We ensure all documentation complies with import regulations of the destination country.

quality.question: How do you ensure product quality?
quality.answer: We maintain strict quality control throughout the supply chain. Our products are sourced directly from partner farmers who follow our agricultural best practices. Each batch undergoes quality inspection including moisture content testing, impurity analysis, and grading before shipment. We can provide laboratory test reports upon request and offer product samples for prior approval.

sourcing.question: Where do you source your products?
sourcing.answer: We source our products directly from farmers across Indonesia's main agricultural regions including Sumatra, Java, Kalimantan, Sulawesi, and Papua. By working directly with farmers, we ensure fair trade practices, traceability, and consistent quality. Our long-term partnerships with local farming communities allow us to secure reliable supplies throughout the year.
